title: Ryuubatsu no Fiera
titleRomaji: Ryuubatsu no Fiera
titleNative: 竜伐のフィエラ
synopsis: The Kingdom of Swordland was reduced to ashes in a single night by a dragon that appeared out of nowhere. Princess Fiera, who lost her homeland and family before her very eyes, rises up to slay her sworn enemy, the calamity known as the "dragon," while bearing her brother's will and the unvoiced grief of the people on her still young shoulders!

title: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleNative: 私を好きすぎる勇者様を利用して、今世こそ長生きするつもりだったのに（多分、また失敗した）
synonyms: I’m Using the Hero Who Loves Me Too Much, Because I Planned to Live a Long Life in This World (I Probably Failed Again)
synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

tags.name: Josei
tags.description: Target demographic is adult females.

title: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleRomaji: Koishita Hito wa, Imouto no Kawari ni Shindekure to Itta.: Imouto to Kekkon Shita Kataomoi Aite ga Naze Imasara Watashi no Moto ni? to Omottara @COMIC
titleEnglish: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleNative: 恋した人は、妹の代わりに死んでくれと言った。―妹と結婚した片思い相手がなぜ今さら私のもとに？と思ったら―@COMIC
synopsis: Wisteria, the daughter of a count, secretly has feelings for Bright, a beautiful childhood friend and son of a duke who, unable to use magic, had been conducting forbidden research in the shadows. Devastated when Bright confesses his love for her younger sister, Wisteria is even more hurt when he asks her to take her sister's place as a sacrifice. Is her love for Bright so strong that she will give up her life for him? (Source: TOKYOPOP)

title: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleNative: 追放令嬢、クラフトしながらキャンピングカーで異世界を旅します
synonyms: The Exiled Lady Travels to Another World in a Camper Van While Crafting
synopsis: Riding in a camper, eating delicious food, and enjoying the spectacular view. Saori Furuki was a university student in the engineering department and loved making things. After a car accident, she is reborn as Eline, the daughter of a viscount, However, her family treats her coldly, saying that she is incompetent and can only use magic to produce items, and she is exiled from the country. However, Eline's “alchemy magic” is a magic that has unlimited possibilities when combined with the knowledge from her previous life! Determined to live freely from now on, Eline has created a camper for starters. She can move around, live, and make things as she pleases. Together with Aristy, a martial maid who adores Eline, she begins her adventurous journey with a sense of ease. Eating delicious food, admiring the spectacular scenery, and creating useful things. This is a travel story about riding in a camper and enjoying another world with elegance. (Source: SB Creative, translated)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

chapterSourceTitle: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai o Tabishimasu

title: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 3 Let's spread books through the duchy!
titleRomaji: Honzuki no Gekokujou: Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen Dai 3-bu - Ryouchi ni Hon wo Hirogeyou!
titleEnglish: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 3 Let's spread books through the duchy!
titleNative: 本好きの下剋上~司書になるためには手段を選んでいられません~ 第三部 「領地に本を広げよう!」
synonyms: Honzuki no Gekokujou ~Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen~ Dai 3-bu 「Ryouchi ni Hon o Hirogeyou!」
synopsis: Manga adaptation of Part 3 of Honzuki no Gekokujou . To protect those she cares about from danger, Myne abandons the life she knows to become Rozemyne, the archduke’s mana-rich adopted daughter. But her passion for books hasn’t changed, nor does she hesitate to charge into another strange new world. In this biblio-fantasy by bookworms, for bookworms, the detailed setting continues to expand—and so too does the book-making industry! (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: A military policeman, Taka'akira, couldn't stand his childhood friend, Chiaki's way of living...he doesn't work, just plays around with women every day using money he had inherited. Recently, Taka'akira's team has been working on "Ladykiller" cases--victims we

title: The Babe at My Back Has Her Eye on Me. I'm Done For.
titleRomaji: Ushiro no Seki no Gal ni Sukarete Shimatta.: Mou Ore wa Damekamoshirenai.
titleEnglish: The Babe at My Back Has Her Eye on Me. I'm Done For.
titleNative: うしろの席のぎゃるに好かれてしまった。　もう俺はダメかもしれない。
synonyms: The Gal Sitting Behind Me Likes Me.: Maybe I'm Screwed Already.
The gal is sitting behind me, and loves me.
synopsis: A high-school boy Sandai, who liked to spend his time alone, accidentally helped the most beautiful girl in his class, Shino, when she fell into a ditch near his home. He let her use shower at his home, and lend her some clothes, although he had never talked with her before. From that day, she started to act like his friend. In fact, she seems to like him...but that can't be! She's the most popular babe in his high school! But what he didn't know was, Shino had never went out with a guy. She was not very good with guys, and Sandai was the first guy she could talk naturally with. As they spend time together, Sandai can't help himself to have special feelings for Shino. A story of a boy whose life was completely changed by a cute babe! (Source: KADOKAWA Global)

But when Yuu is reunited with his former crush, the relationship between Himari and Yuu began to change......? (Source: Dengeki Daioh, translated)

titleRomaji: Hayachine!
titleNative: ハヤチネ!
synopsis: After the death of their parents, the three siblings Seiji, Kozue and Shima get taken in by their uncle and move from Tokyo to Ohasama in the countryside. Will they be able to adapt to their new life in the middle of nowhere? A lighthearted slice of life story begins...

title: Koi to Senrigan to Aonisai
titleRomaji: Koi to Senrigan to Aonisai
titleNative: 恋と千里眼と青二才
synopsis: Chihaya Senri is a high school girl who has the power of "senrigan", the ability to see the future. One day, she received a confession of love from a young boy named Eita. She refused, saying "I can't go out with a child..." But through her senrigan, she could see herself being with Eita in the future, after he has grown into an adult! She knows he'll be the man of her dreams. But if she started dating him now, she would be committing a crime! What will happen to the relationship between a wavering JK and an eager shota? (Source: Yan Manga, translated)

title: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleRomaji: Isekai Nidome no Ossan, Dou Kangaete mo Koukousei Yuusha yori Tsuyoi
titleEnglish: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleNative: 異世界二度目のおっさん、どう考えても高校生勇者より強い
synonyms: The Old Man in His Second Time in Another World Is Somehow Stronger than the High School Hero
synopsis: Riku Takayanagi is a boring 32-year-old businessman with nothing special about him. Or so it seems. In truth, he once saved another world as a hero. Now he’s back in Japan, living a normal life… until one day, he’s dragged into the mess with three high school students and summoned again—this time to a different world?! Suddenly thrust into the unknown, Riku steadies the panicked teen heroes, encourages them, and teaches them how to survive. The long-awaited opening to a second-chance another-world adventure—starring a caring, absurdly overpowered old man hero! (Source: Alpha Manga)

title: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleRomaji: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleNative: 修羅幼女の英雄譚　～半端者と言われた傭兵、幼女に転生して成り上がる～
synonyms: The Heroic Tale of Shura Young Girl: A Mercenary Who was Said to be Half-Baked is Reincarnated as a Young Girl and Rises to Success
synopsis: "If I had a second life, wouldn't I be a ‘hero’ again?" Solfort Enuma is an old soldier who has spent more than 60 years training to become a 'hero'. He was an ordinary man with no talent, but he never gave up and continued to pursue his dream. One day, Solfort faced the 'hero' he had always longed for, but his sword failed to strike a blow and he met an unrewarding end... It was supposed to happen, but Solfort found himself reincarnated as a young girl...! Now her (his) heroic tale begins, as she (he) changes her name to Sol, to once again pursue the dream that did not come true in her previous life!

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

chapterSourceTitle: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan ~Hanpa-sha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru~

title: Arte
titleRomaji: Arte
titleNative: アルテ
synopsis: The story takes place in 16th century Florence during a time when women were relegated to the role of wives and caretakers, a young noble girl named Arte dreams of being an artist’s apprentice. One day she stumbles on the workshop of the eccentric Maestro Leo who decides to accept her as his student. Follow Arte on her journey as she discovers the joy and struggles on the path to becoming a maestro. (Source: Comikey) Note: Series resumed in June 2025 after the conclusion of the main story

title: Darwin no Taizai
titleRomaji: Darwin no Taizai
titleNative: ダーウィンの大罪
synopsis: In a world shrouded in darkness, where demons run rampant, a young man named Hisago Harukawa, once forced into committing crimes under the threats of demons, sets his sights on his next target: a suspicious woman who calls herself Darwin, proponent of “Evolution.”! But this encounter changes everything, Hisago is pulled into a battle to send demons back to the depths of hell!! To survive, he must evolve. A devil-hunting fantasy of atonement begins!!!

title: They Were 11!
titleRomaji: 11-nin Iru!
titleNative: 11人いる!
synopsis: They Were 11 is about ten Galactic University recruits who have passed many levels only to be given one final test. They are told to travel to an ancient spaceship and live there, together, for fifty-three days. This is not a problem until the ten recruits, hailing from diverse backgrounds and planets, discover that there are actually eleven of them on the ship. In fact, this problem turns out to be the test, as they have to trust each other in order to survive, even though one of them is an impostor. (Source: VIZ Media) Note: Won the 21st Shogakukan Manga Award for Shoujo in 1975.

title: Isekai Shoukan Ojisan no Juu Musou Life: Sabage-zuki Salaryman wa Kaisha Owari ni Isekai e Chokki Suru
titleRomaji: Isekai Shoukan Ojisan no Juu Musou Life: Sabage-zuki Salaryman wa Kaisha Owari ni Isekai e Chokki Suru
titleNative: 異世界召喚おじさんの銃無双ライフ ～サバゲー好きサラリーマンは会社終わりに異世界へ直帰する～
synonyms: Middle-Aged Man Overpowers with Guns in the Another Universe.
Isekai Shoukan Ojisan no Juu Musou Life: Survival Game-zuki Salaryman wa Kaisha Owari ni Isekai e Chokki Suru
synopsis: The middle-aged man and airsoft enthusiast Daisuke Koga is summoned to a different world on his 40th birthday. Given the ability to turn airsoft guns into real guns, Daisuke must save the other world while traveling back and forth between reality and the fantasy world. Alongside female swordsman Rena, Daisuke becomes the only gun user and dominates in the fantasy world after work! (Source: Houbunsha, translated)

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

tags.name: Guns
tags.description: Prominently features the use of guns in combat.

title: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou to Akuyaku Reisoku ga, Deatte Koi ni Ochita Nara: Nanashi no Seirei to Keiyakushite Oidasareta Reijou wa, Kyou mo Reisoku to Kisoiatteiru Youdesu
titleEnglish: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleNative: 悪役令嬢と悪役令息が、出逢って恋に落ちたなら　～名無しの精霊と契約して追い出された令嬢は、今日も令息と競い合っているようです～
synonyms: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
악역 영애와 악역 영식이 만나서 사랑에 빠지면
synopsis: Contracted with a no-name spirit, Brigitte Meidell is a disappointment to her noble family and the mockery of her peers at the Otoleanna Academy of Magic—except for one. Yuri Aurealis is intelligent, handsome…and oh so arrogant. He’s made enemies of the same people as Brigitte, meaning the two should get along just fine. However, his boorishness accidentally sparks a rivalry between them. It’s a competition that has the potential to bring the two closer than they ever thought…! (Source: Yen Press)
